overview.description: The Brookstone Yield ETF (BAMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks to provide current income through a combination of equity and fixed income securities from around the globe. The fund advisor has wide flexibility in relative weightings to asset classes BAMY was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
